title: The Black Cat Plot Tightens Around Kaya
description: On pages 14–17, the Syrup Village story develops through Usopp, Kaya, Kuro, Jango, and the Straw Hats as the danger behind the village’s peaceful surface becomes clearer.
scene: This scene follows the tension around Usopp’s village: lies, loyalty, hidden plans, and the growing clash with the Black Cat Pirates.

dialogue.speaker: Usopp
dialogue.text: I'm USOPP, brave warrior of the sea...

dialogue.speaker: Kaya
dialogue.text: I've heard about your mis- fortune

dialogue.speaker: Kaya
dialogue.text: So I'm here to talk to you, to cheer you up!

dialogue.speaker: Kaya
dialogue.text: It's none of your business! Get out of here!

dialogue.speaker: Kaya
dialogue.text: I just like to mind other peo- ple's busi- Ness!

dialogue.speaker: Kuro
dialogue.text: Is he still mad at the Butler for looking down on his dad?

dialogue.speaker: Kaya
dialogue.text: No! His express- silon is different!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #2
dialogue.text: Something must have happened at the shore!

dialogue.speaker: Kaya
dialogue.text: Hey kids, how do I get to the shore?

dialogue.speaker: Kaya
dialogue.text: I think some- thing big has hap- pened!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #2
dialogue.text: Right! That hypno- list went that way too a while ago!

dialogue.speaker: Kaya
dialogue.text: Are you guys done? How do I get there?

dialogue.speaker: Kaya
dialogue.text: pirates are going to attack this village tomorrow morning!

dialogue.speaker: Kaya
dialogue.text: Damn! It's that big fat liar again!

dialogue.speaker: Kaya
dialogue.text: Just ignore him, pirates won't come!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #5
dialogue.text: He's been doing it a bit too much lately!

summary: The part advances the Syrup Village arc by tying Usopp’s reputation and Kaya’s safety to the threat posed by Kuro and his crew.
